customSize.answer: Yes — many products support custom dimensions. Enable the custom format option in the configurator to enter your own width and height.
customSize.question: Can I order a custom size?

fileRequirements.answer: We accept PDF, PNG, JPEG, and TIFF files. For best results, supply vector-based PDFs with fonts outlined and 3 mm bleed.
fileRequirements.question: What file formats do you accept?

minimumOrder.answer: Minimum quantities vary by product. Check the quantity selector on the product page for the lowest available amount.
minimumOrder.question: Is there a minimum order quantity?

shipping.answer: We ship via tracked courier across Poland and the EU. Shipping cost is calculated at checkout based on order weight and destination.
shipping.question: How does shipping work?

turnaround.answer: Estimated delivery dates are displayed next to each quantity option in the quantity selector and in the cart, so you can pick the timeline that suits you.
turnaround.question: How long does production take?

anonymousPackageShipping.tooltip: Depending on the courier company handling the shipment, the sender will appear as the provided address or the courier's logistics center. The shipping provider, such as InPost or DHL, will be chosen based on anonymous shipping availability. Anonymous package shipping is not available with cash on delivery or international shipping.

finishing.cutToSizeHint: Trim all edges to the final size. This removes reinforcement and tunnels, but grommets can stay enabled.
finishing.dialogDescription: Choose the edge options that should be applied to this product. Cut to size clears reinforcement and tunnels, but can stay combined with grommets.
finishing.grommetsHint: Add grommets on selected edges. Can be combined with reinforcement on the same edge or with cut to size.
finishing.grommetsOffsetEndHint: Leaves free space after the last grommet on each selected edge.
finishing.grommetsOffsetStartHint: Leaves free space before the first grommet on each selected edge.
finishing.grommetsSettingsEmpty: Select at least one grommet edge to adjust spacing and corner distances.
finishing.grommetsSpacingHint: Distance between consecutive grommets on each selected edge.
finishing.grommetsSummary: Spacing {{spacing}} cm • first corner {{offsetStart}} cm • last corner {{offsetEnd}} cm
finishing.tunnelHint: Welded tunnel on selected edges. Cannot be combined with reinforcement or grommets on the same edge.
finishing.unavailableWithCutToSize: Unavailable while Cut to size is enabled.

imageGeneration.authHint: Sign in with a standard customer account to unlock image generation.
imageGeneration.currentFormatMissing: Current format will be derived from the product configuration.
imageGeneration.dataUsageDescription: Your prompt and reference images are sent to Google Vertex AI for generation. Do not include confidential or personal data.
imageGeneration.description: Describe the project, choose a style, and generate a final production graphic.
imageGeneration.emailHint: Verify your email address before generating images. After confirming the link, refresh this page.

errors.acceptFailed: Failed to attach the generated graphic.
errors.addToCartUnavailable: The current product configuration is not ready to be added to cart yet.
errors.anonymousNotAllowed: Anonymous accounts cannot use image generation.
errors.disabledForProduct: AI graphic generation is not enabled for this product.
errors.emailNotVerified: Verify your email address before generating images.
errors.invalidFileSize: Reference images must be 4 MB or smaller.
errors.invalidFileType: Only PNG, JPG, and WebP reference images are supported.
errors.monthlyBudgetExceeded: AI graphic generation is temporarily unavailable because this month's service budget has been reached. Please try again next month.

imageGeneration.generationStatusOvertime: This can take up to a minute. Finalizing the image now…
imageGeneration.generateHint: The selected style and your brief are merged into the server-side generation prompt before the final artwork is created.
imageGeneration.devLimitsDescription: Development mode removes the hourly limit. Prompt, file, and account checks still apply.
imageGeneration.devRemainingAttempts: Development mode: hourly limit disabled for testing.
imageGeneration.heroDescription: Write the brief, pick a style, add references if needed, and generate final artwork for this product.

highlights.productionDescription: The workflow avoids mockups and pushes the result toward flat artwork suited for print production.
highlights.referencesDescription: Optional images help guide composition, palette, and typography without copying source work.
highlights.speedDescription: Most generations finish within about a minute, so you can iterate quickly.
highlights.styleDescription: Pick a direction before generating so the final prompt reflects the mood you want.

imageGeneration.improvePromptDescription: Optional: let AI sharpen your brief before generating.
imageGeneration.improvePromptLabel: Improve my brief with AI before generating
imageGeneration.largeFormatDescription: Formats above 500 × 500 mm will be upscaled and checked manually before production. Keep layouts bold and readable from distance.
imageGeneration.limitsDescription: Verified customers can generate up to {{count}} final graphics per hour. Prompts must be {{min}}-{{max}} words, and you can add up to {{references}} reference images.
imageGeneration.multipleSidesNotice: Both printable sides were generated as separate files.
imageGeneration.openButtonDescription: Write a detailed brief, choose a style, add optional references, and generate a production-ready graphic in one polished workspace.
imageGeneration.openButtonDescriptionGenerating: Generation continues in the background. Reopen the studio to watch progress and download the result when it is ready.
imageGeneration.openButtonDescriptionReady: Your latest generated graphic is ready to review, download, or attach.
imageGeneration.promptHelper: Cover the goal, audience, colors, and must-have content in 30–500 words.
imageGeneration.promptPlaceholder: Example: Design a modern flyer for a spring coffee tasting event. Use a warm cream background, deep green accents, clean sans-serif typography, and a premium editorial feel. Highlight the tasting date, limited seats, and a subtle illustrated coffee leaf motif…
imageGeneration.referenceDropzoneDescription: PNG, JPG, or WebP only. Up to {{count}} files, {{size}} MB each.
imageGeneration.referenceDropzoneTitle: Drag and drop reference images here or click to browse
imageGeneration.referenceHelper: Up to 3 files. Use them as inspiration only.

success.description: Your final AI production graphic is ready.
success.title: Image ready

imageGeneration.styleHelper: This preference is added to the server-side prompt.

kreatywny.description: Bolder ideas and a more expressive layout.
kreatywny.label: Creative

nowoczesny.description: Fresh contrast and clear geometric structure.

imageGeneration.title: Generate a final production graphic with AI

tutorial.step1: Describe the goal, audience, colors, and must-have content.
tutorial.step2: Choose a style and add references only if they help guide the direction.
tutorial.step3: Enable prompt improvement if you want AI to tighten the brief first.
tutorial.step4: If the selected print mode is double-sided, the tool will generate separate front and back files.
